name: Neptune | Virus Leak
description:
Neptune | Virus Leak
During a routine transportation of classified space cargo, an incident occurred... A dangerous virus leaked from the cargo, turning people who fell under its influence into mutants and monsters. Now, the cargo ship without a sign of life smoothly floats through the endless space in the middle of nowhere, while inside the ship there is a desperate struggle for survival.

The few who were not reached by the cargo will soon die from their former colleagues and comrades...
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

I did not specify your origin. You can be either an adventurer who found the ship in space, or one of the ship's crew, or just a passenger.


Dead Dove for a reason.

Here's an extra for you because you were good people last year~
Happy ending?
creator: PavPav
